meta.description: Personal timing doctrine — Best/Master PH gate, Core 4 weighting, cold-start priors

ph_gate.suppression_message: High conviction blocked: your doctrine allows High only in Best or Master Personal Hours (6, 8, 9, 11, 22, 33). Current PH {ph} is {quality}.

lagna.notes: Capricorn Lagna: structure-first execution, long-term foundations, Saturnian discipline. Favor SOPs, contracts, and compounding over flashy pivots.

moon.notes: Scorpio Moon: depth, intensity, and transformation timing. Best for high-stakes conversations after emotional clarity; avoid forcing outcomes during volatile or secretive windows.
